learnings.summary: `caliber sync` is NOT a valid subcommand — use `caliber refresh` instead. CLAUDE
learnings.explanation: Event 28 failed silently when running `caliber sync` — the command is not valid. Event 29 confirmed via `caliber --help` that no `sync` subcommand exists. The correct command is `refresh`, as used by the SessionEnd hook in `.claude/settings.json`. CLAUDE.md and rules docs both incorrectly reference `caliber sync`.

learnings.summary: `caliber init` takes ~10 minutes — always run as a background task: `caliber ini
learnings.explanation: Events 9-16: `caliber init` started at 04:26, background task notification arrived at 04:36 — ~10 minutes. Multiple polling attempts (events 12, 13, 14, 15) were needed before the process completed. Background task notification pattern is the correct approach.

learnings.summary: `caliber refresh --quiet` produces no stdout on success — empty result is normal
learnings.explanation: Events 39-44: `caliber refresh --quiet` completed (exit 0) but both stdout and the output file were empty. The user's task notification confirmed success. Empty output on quiet mode is normal behavior.
Event 49: `npm list -g` confirmed MCP packages already installed at `/opt/homebrew/lib`. The `.mcp.json` using `npx -y` will resolve to these cached globals — no re-download needed.

Event 27 vs event 45: Agent added statusLine to `~/.claude/settings.json` (global) in event 27. User confirmed this was correct in event 45-47. Clarifies that statusLine is a user-level setting, separate from project hooks.
Event 38: `.gitignore` shows `.caliber/` excluded. The freshness hook reads `.caliber/.caliber-state.json` for `lastRefreshSha` — this state is per-machine and intentionally not committed.

learnings.summary: `caliber init` output file contains raw ANSI escape sequences (spinner animation
learnings.explanation: Events 12-15: Agent tried grepping caliber init output file for 'Step 4|Complete|score|Error' but ANSI spinner codes made line-based grep unreliable — the until loop never exited cleanly. Reusable trap for any future session monitoring caliber init.

learnings.summary: Files generated by `caliber init` — including `.claude/rules/agent-config.md` an
learnings.explanation: Events 28-29: Agent called `caliber sync` which failed silently (empty {}). Despite this being in existing learnings, it was called again — confirms the generated rule file at .claude/rules/agent-config.md still promotes the wrong command and will mislead future agents.

learnings.summary: `caliber score --json` produces multi-line JSON — piping through `head -1` retur
learnings.explanation: Event 17: `caliber score --json --quiet | head -1` returned only `{` — multi-line JSON split across lines, head -1 is the wrong tool here.

learnings.summary: `caliber refresh` may emit "Last refresh failed: Claude Code CLI is installed bu
learnings.explanation: Event 24: caliber refresh output shows 'Last refresh failed: Claude Code CLI is installed but not logged in' at start but then proceeds to successfully refresh all configs — non-fatal warning worth documenting.

learnings.summary: MCP github server requires `GITHUB_TOKEN` exported in the shell — `.mcp.json` us
learnings.explanation: Event 25/28: User exported GITHUB_TOKEN; .mcp.json uses ${GITHUB_TOKEN} substitution — env var must be set in shell before session or github MCP tools fail.
Event 29: git remote -v revealed atlassynapseai/MVP as the canonical repo URL — useful reference for future sessions.

learnings.summary: Stack locked for MVP: pnpm + Turborepo monorepo, Next.js 15 App Router (TypeScri
learnings.explanation: Events 30-36: User defined explicit architecture planning format (GOAL/ARCHITECTURE/PLAN/RISKS/CODEX HANDOFF) and locked the full tech stack via PDF review + website fetch — these decisions are durable and future sessions should not re-derive them.

learnings.summary: Codex handoff format (user-defined): GOAL / ARCHITECTURE / PLAN / RISKS / CODEX
learnings.explanation: No user corrections detected — no [correction] items needed this session.
